headline: Piper Sandler Lowers its Price Target on Kraft Heinz (KHC) to $24 from $26
summary: The Kraft Heinz Company (NASDAQ:KHC) is one of the 7 Heavily-Battered Consumer Stocks That Could Triple by 2027. On March 23, 2026, Piper Sandler lowered the price target on The Kraft Heinz Company (NASDAQ:KHC) to $24 from $26 and maintained a Neutral rating. Piper Sandler said the company’s shift toward increased investment in its brands […]

headline: Why Kraft Heinz’s CEO Decided Not to Split the Company in Two
summary: Steve Cahillane, the food CEO who has twice broken up companies, is now taking on the surprise challenge of keeping one together.

headline: Tesco and Sainsbury’s non-loyalty brand prices more expensive than Waitrose
